author: Alexandr Dubovikov
message:
fix(storage): prevent duplicate cold copies when hot tiering delete fails

Retry hot-catalog DELETE with writer catalog lock coordination, skip
re-insert when cold already holds the partition, and report partial moves
honestly. Fixes #866.

Merge pull request #863 from sipcapture/fix/862-pcap-uploader-auth-11.0.290

fix(ui): PCAP uploader Authorization undefined (#862)

author: Alexandr Dubovikov
message:
fix(ui): send cookie auth for PCAP uploader instead of Authorization: undefined

The PCAP Uploader read authHeader.Authorization directly, which becomes the
literal string "undefined" when the session uses HttpOnly cookies. Spread
authHeader, include credentials, and handle 401 like other dashboard widgets.

Fixes #862. Bump VERSION_APPLICATION to 11.0.290.

author: Alexandr Dubovikov
message:
Merge pull request #860 from danieldonoghue/fix/data-extra-json-extract-string-timestamp

fix: use json_extract_string() for data_extra comparisons (follow-up to #859)

author: Daniel Donoghue
message:
fix: use json_extract_string() for data_extra comparisons, not ->>

PR #859 (v11.0.288) replaced json_extract() with the ->> operator for
data_extra string comparisons. But 'data_extra ->> $.path' combined with a
timestamp-range filter (which the search UI always sends) triggers a DuckDB
planner error and 500s the whole search endpoint:

  Conversion Error: Failed to cast value to numerical: {...} when casting
  from source column data_extra

Minimal repro (DuckDB):
  WHERE data_extra ->> '$.custom_headers."X-Foo"' = 'v'                -- OK
  WHERE timestamp >= .. AND timestamp <= ..                              -- OK
  WHERE timestamp .. AND data_extra ->> '$...' = 'v'                     -- ERROR
  WHERE timestamp .. AND json_extract_string(data_extra,'$...') = 'v'   -- OK

json_extract_string() returns the same unquoted value but is not affected by
the planner issue. Applied to the value / absent / present clauses (virtual
fields, from_host, to_host, user_agent, request_uri, capture_id), updated the
SQL-shape tests, and added a regression test asserting json_extract_string is
used (not ->>).

author: Alexandr Dubovikov
message:
Merge pull request #859 from sipcapture/fix/data-extra-json-extract-string

fix: use ->> for data_extra string comparisons (closes #857)

author: Alexandr Dubovikov
message: Merge branch 'homer11' into fix/data-extra-json-extract-string

author: Alexandr Dubovikov
message:
fix: use ->> instead of json_extract for data_extra string comparisons

Replace CAST(json_extract(data_extra, '$.path') AS VARCHAR) with
data_extra ->> '$.path' for all data_extra JSON field comparisons.

DuckDB's json_extract() returns JSON-quoted strings (e.g. "value"),
making exact-match (=) comparisons fail silently. The ->> operator
returns the raw string value without quotes, enabling proper equality
checks for virtual fields with kind: data_extra_json and match: equals,
as well as built-in filters (from_host, to_host, user_agent,
request_uri, capture_id).

Fixes #857

👹 Fixed by Goblin

author: Alexandr Dubovikov

Merge pull request #854 from sipcapture/feat/s3-url-style-11.0.287

feat: configurable S3 URL style for DuckLake (11.0.287)

author: Alexandr Dubovikov
message:
chore(release): bump version to 11.0.287

Release S3 URL style configuration for DuckLake (Aliyun OSS vhost support).

author: chenpeng
message:
feat: support configurable S3 URL style for DuckLake

## Summary

Add support for configuring DuckDB S3 URL style across DuckLake storage paths. This allows custom S3-compatible endpoints to use either the existing path-style behavior or virtual-hosted-style access when required by providers such as Aliyun OSS.

## Changes

- Added `s3_url_style` / `url_style` configuration fields for DuckLake S3 settings.
- Propagated the S3 URL style through writer, node, CLI, tiered storage, compaction, and DuckLake manager setup.
- Updated DuckDB S3 client settings and DuckLake S3 secret creation to use the configured URL style.
- Preserved the existing default behavior by normalizing empty URL style values to `path`.
- Added test coverage for custom `vhost` URL style handling.
- Updated documentation for environment variables, node volume config, and storage policy volume config.

## Validation

- `go test ./storage/ducklake`

Merge pull request #849 from sipcapture/feat/search-exact-match-lazy-uuid-phase

feat(search): exact form filters and uuid-only lazy search phase

author: Alexandr Dubovikov
message:
fix(ingest): route REFER SIP messages to hep_proto_1_call

Homer 7 and the HEP decoder profile already treat REFER as call traffic;
GetSIPType incorrectly sent it to hep_proto_1_default, so the calls search
and transaction view never showed REFER. Align storage routing with Homer 7.

Fixes #850

author: Alexandr Dubovikov
message:
feat(search): exact form filters and uuid-only lazy search phase

Use equality for dashboard form string filters unless the value contains
a user-supplied % wildcard. Shrink lazy_payload phase 1 to SELECT uuid,
timestamp and hydrate full rows by uuid in phase 2.
